summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-creation action is allowed by this job; the only mutation-shaped lane is routing the exact security-sensitive linked PR #64127 to central security handling. The five inventory PRs remain open as independent PR work needing maintainer or author follow-up before any finalization.
